qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_sujeto as oi_sujeto, t0.c_sujeto as c_sujeto, t0.d_sujeto as d_sujeto, t0.c_enlace as c_enlace, t0.d_email as d_email, SEC.policy, t0.c_sujeto as CODE, t0.d_sujeto as TEXT, t0.oi_personal as oi_personal, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_ubicacion as oi_ubicacion FROM LEG40_SUJETOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_sujeto LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_sujeto asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_sujeto as oi_sujeto, SEC.policy FROM LEG40_SUJETOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_sujeto LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_sujeto asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto) as CNT from LEG40_SUJETOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG40_SUJETOS.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG40_SUJETOS.c_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select ls.oi_sujeto as ID, ls.c_sujeto as COD, ls.d_sujeto as DES FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj LEFT OUTER lc.oi_clasif_suj Where lc.c_conflictos = \'1\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ls.oi_sujeto) as CNT FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj LEFT OUTER lc.oi_clasif_suj Where lc.c_conflictos = \'1\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ls.oi_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ls.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ls.c_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.SUJETO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ls.oi_sujeto) as CNT FROM LEG33_ROL as lr, LEG33_CLASIF_ROL as lcr, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN lr.oi_rol INNER lcr.oi_rol, lcr.oi_clasif_suj INNER lc.oi_clasif_suj, lc.oi_clasif_suj INNER t.oi_clasif_suj, t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ls.oi_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ls.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ls.c_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and lr.oi_rol={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} GROUP BY ls.oi_sujeto, ls.c_sujeto, ls.d_sujeto ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Valida antes de guardar un sujeto en codificadora sujetos
method.name: VALIDATOR

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto) as CNT from LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG41_CLASIF join LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.OI_CLASIF_SUJ inner LEG41_CLASIF.OI_CLASIF_SUJ Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG41_CLASIF.d_clasif_suj,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select t.oi_clasif_sujeto as ID, ls.c_sujeto as COD, (ls.d_sujeto + \'_\' +lc.d_clasif_suj) as DES, t.oi_sujeto as PARENT FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj INNER lc.oi_clasif_suj Where lc.c_tareas = \'1\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ls.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(lc.d_clasif_suj,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto as ID, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto as COD, LEG41_CLASIF.d_clasif_suj as DES, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto as PARENT, LEG40_SUJETOS.c_sujeto, LEG40_SUJETOS.d_sujeto from LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG41_CLASIF, LEG40_SUJETOS join LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.OI_CLASIF_SUJ inner LEG41_CLASIF.OI_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto INNER LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto) as CNT from LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG41_CLASIF, LEG40_SUJETOS join LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.OI_CLASIF_SUJ inner LEG41_CLASIF.OI_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto INNER LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG41_CLASIF.d_clasif_suj,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryClasifSujeto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto
FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG40_SUJETOS, LEG41_CLASIF
JOIN LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto INNER LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_suj INNER LEG41_CLASIF.oi_clasif_suj
WHERE LEG40_SUJETOS.c_sujeto = {#PARAM:@c_sujeto} AND LEG41_CLASIF.c_clasif_suj = {#PARAM:@c_clasif_suj}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Sujetos.CLASIF_SUJETO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select t.oi_clasif_sujeto as ID, t.oi_clasif_sujeto as COD, (ls.d_sujeto + \'_\' +lc.d_clasif_suj) as DES, t.oi_sujeto as PARENT FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj INNER lc.oi_clasif_suj Where lc.c_liq_final = \'1\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ls.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(lc.d_clasif_suj,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(t.oi_clasif_sujeto) as CNT FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj INNER lc.oi_clasif_suj Where lc.c_liq_final = \'1\' {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ls.d_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(lc.d_clasif_suj,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(t.oi_clasif_sujeto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%?
